name: netflix-subtitle-styler
description: A Chrome/Firefox extension to fully customize Netflix subtitles with presets and granular controls.

scripts.zip:chrome: zip -r dist/netflix-subtitle-styler-chrome.zip manifest.json background content icons options popup src -x '*.DS_Store'
scripts.zip:firefox: zip -r dist/netflix-subtitle-styler-firefox.zip manifest.json background content icons options popup src -x '*.DS_Store'

author: raafy
